design_philosophy: A cinematic luxury destination that unfolds like a short film. As the user scrolls, layered parallax animations and bold typography reveal a refined brand story, mirroring the craftsmanship and exclusivity of a high-end royal Indian wedding.

typography.font_pairings_rationale: Cormorant Garamond provides a timeless, royal, and editorial feel for headings, perfectly contrasting with the clean, modern geometry of Outfit for readability in body copy.

heading_scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-light

spacing_and_layout.global_padding: Generous spacing. Sections should use py-24 or py-32. Do not cram content.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Tetris Grid (Mode A). Break symmetrical layouts. Use asymmetrical overlapping images, col-span-4 vs col-span-8 to create editorial tension.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Headings often center-aligned for grand statements; narrative text left-aligned for readability.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_constraints: Images MUST NOT exceed max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none.

surfaces_and_materials.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.
surfaces_and_materials.cards_and_widgets: Flat solid backgrounds (bg-[#141010]) with subtle 1px border (border-white/5). No heavy drop shadows; rely on contrast and ambient glow.
surfaces_and_materials.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay over hero image: bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/40 to-transparent to ensure text contrast.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis for smooth scrolling is MANDATORY. It gives the cinematic 'momentum' required for this luxury vibe.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Use Framer Motion to move images at different speeds (y-axis translations mapped to scroll) for a layered, editorial storytelling effect.
motion_and_interactions.reveals: Elements should fade in and slide up gently as they enter the viewport.

hero.description: Full-screen immersive cinematic view. Couple names in massive Cormorant Garamond, date, and a minimalist countdown timer.

our_story.description: Narrative text paired with an overlapping image layout.

our_journey.description: A vertical timeline showcasing relationship milestones. Alternating left/right bento nodes with candid images.

event_details.description: Cardless, elegant breakdown of ceremonies (Mehendi, Sangeet, Haldi, Wedding, Reception). Use subtle divider lines (border-white/10).

schedule.description: Minimalist list view of day/time breakdown. High typographical hierarchy.

gallery_curated.description: Masonry/Tetris grid of highly polished, luxury-style photos.

gallery_raw.description: Overlapping polaroid/film style layout showing behind-the-scenes, candid emotions.

registry_gifts.description: Simple, elegant text block. 'Your presence is our present.' with subtle luxury accent styling.

location_map.description: Dark-themed abstract map or pin location for Aashish Vatika, Udaipur, Rajasthan.

footer.description: Massive typography 'Jinkle & Yoshita' at text-[10vw], massive py-32 padding.

hero_palace.description: Cinematic wide-angle view of majestic Indian palace at dusk.

cinematic_texture.description: Dark moody abstract background with deep wine red texture and faint gold particle dust.

details_curated.description: Close up of vintage Indian bridal jewelry and dark red roses.

gallery_raw_1.description: Indian couple standing in front of sunset.

gallery_raw_2.description: Indian couple standing next to each other.

gallery_raw_3.description: Couple sitting on a boat at sunset.

palace_door.description: Large wooden door in front of Udaipur building.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Jewel & Luxury archetype. Use the Midnight Obsidian (#0A0A0A) background with Wine Red (#8B1C31) and Muted Gold (#D4AF37) accents.
Do not use generic Shadcn cards for the main layout; this is a highly custom cinematic marketing site. Use raw Tailwind divs to create the overlapping, asymmetrical bento grids.
Implement Framer Motion for parallax image scrolling and staggered text reveals.
Font choices: Add Cormorant Garamond and Outfit via Google Fonts.
Use all provided image URLs in their respective sections to ensure the Udaipur royal vibe is maintained without relying on placeholders.
